sessions.title: Convex TV menu: from blank schema to live floor
sessions.summary: Schema first, then subscriptions, then the public TV surface — with a deliberate failure in the middle.

steps.text: TypeError: subscription closed — TV component mounted before auth context
Split public query (brand slug) vs admin mutation; TV uses read-only token scope
vitest convex functions: inventory.adjust idempotent under double webhook
Deployed: counter + back office + 1080p menu board on the same subscription graph

sessions.title: Dual-brand Next.js: middleware panic to green Playwright
sessions.summary: Host-based routing, Stripe webhooks, and a CSP that almost blocked legitimate OAuth return.

steps.text: ReportOnly CSP blocked WorkOS callback on preview host
Allowlist preview origins via env; split prod vs preview CSP maps
[convex] membership upsert keyed by brand + stripe customer id
playwright e2e (csv matrix): contact → checkout → lesson gate ✓
